questions.question: A data warehouse is designed for what type of users? (Choose all that apply)
What is the primary purpose of matching information to the classes of users in a data warehouse?
questions.hint: Explain the concept of user classes and their significance in data warehousing.

questions.question: An organization has two types of users in its data warehouse: 'active' and 'inactive'. Which type of user classification is typically used in data warehousing?
